nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

nodes.name: 山地森林
nodes.summary: 以成熟阔叶林和混交林为主的山地森林系统。

nodes.name: 稀树草原
nodes.summary: 东非常见的开放草地与湿地边缘复合景观。

nodes.name: Sulawesi bush warbler
nodes.summary: Sulawesi bush warbler（Sulawesi bush warbler，学名 Locustella castanea），在图谱中标记为无危（LC）物种，常见栖息地包括稀树草原、山地森林。

links.label: 栖息于
links.evidence: The Sulawesi bush warbler is found in undisturbed primary montane forest and in secondary forest, as well as adjoining thick scrub, bushes and rank grassland

links.label: 栖息于
links.evidence: The Sulawesi bush warbler is found in undisturbed primary montane forest and in secondary forest, as well as adjoining thick scrub, bushes and rank grassland
